title: Melting Snow
overview: Brothers Rozé and Ash take action in the Northern Lands now conquered by the Neo-Britannian Empire.

title: Ice Wall
overview: Rozé and Ash take on a mission to rescue Kensei Kuroto, the leader of the Seven Shining Stars.

title: Raspberry
overview: Rozé and Ash each take a break after the fight against Neo-Britannia.

title: Alliance
overview: A transport ship arrives with supplies. The new Knightmare Frame model comes accompanied.

title: Damocles
overview: A rescue operation is launched to save the Japanese from the Sky Fortress Damocles and F.L.E.I.J.A.

title: Lavender
overview: Under Kuroto's command, the Stars, Rozé and Ash, are forced to make a decision to stop Damocles.

title: Hazy Moon
overview: Rozé who believed Ash to be his father’s enemy, visits the Lavender Home where Ash was raised.

title: Ginto
overview: As a result of Christoph's interrogations into the secret of Geass, the resistance base is raided.

title: Reset
overview: The SSS are devastated and Rozé is in a hopeless situation. They receive intel of a proposed peace.

title: Purple Surf
overview: Unidentified machines begin to appear around the world, causing fear and confusion. Fighters in every country take on the machines with their Knightmare Frames, but prove to be no match against their overwhelming numbers and strength.

title: Devastating Force
overview: An unidentified machines cause worldwide chaos. Norland tries to move on to the next stage of his plan. The team realise that something must be done about the Situmpe Wall in order to thwart his plan. Rozé launches an operation to nullify the wall.

title: Breaking Dawn
overview: Disheartened by the enemy, Ash turns the Geass curse into a vow and faces the final battle.
